job_title: Founding Full Stack Engineer - AI Focused
job_nlp_title: Founding Full Stack Engineer - AI Focused
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Full stack development, Backend development, API design, Data modeling, Distributed systems
skill_match_scores: Full stack development:0.0, Backend development:1.0, API design:1.0, Data modeling:1.0, Distributed systems:0.0
must_have_quals: 3–6 years of engineering experience building and operating production systems, Strong backend fundamentals. APIs, data modeling, distributed systems basics, and pragmatic infrastructure, Experience building data pipelines in messy real-world environments, Experience integrating with legacy systems and uncooperative third parties, Practical understanding of AI systems. How models fail, how tool-use breaks, and how to design around brittleness, Strong engineering judgment. You can explain tradeoffs, keep scope tight, and choose simple approaches that scale
preferred_quals: Experience operating systems with multi-tenant requirements, Experience with evaluation frameworks for AI/agent workflows, Experience building internal platforms or shared primitives that multiple teams build on, Hospitality, travel, or other 'messy ops' domain experience
core_responsibilities: Build backend systems that power agent workflows in production, Orchestrate jobs, manage state, design idempotency, and handle retries, Design and scale the data layer. Pipelines, schemas, quality checks, and freshness from legacy property systems through to live inference, Take on technically challenging architecture. Multi-tenant design, integration abstractions, permissions models, and robust failure handling, Own quality end to end. Define evals, catch regressions, and raise the bar under deadline pressure, Ship v0s fast without creating future traps. Know which decisions are reversible and which foundations must be correct
job_summary: Proper Hospitality is seeking a Founding Full-Stack Engineer (AI-focused) to build the production systems behind their hospitality OS. The role involves designing and implementing backend systems, data pipelines, and orchestration to enhance operational efficiency in hospitality.
